subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest how the earth hath grown narrow for Thy loved ones, and how the eyes of Thy servants have turned away from them in all lands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری کیف ضاقت الارض علی احبائک و زاغ عنهم ابصار عبادک فی کل
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude, @rejection, opposition and persecution
